package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for constructor_reads_env_directly: Constructors that call `os.Getenv` instead of receiving normalized config.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule017NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule017NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule017NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario017Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule017NegativeService, input Rule017NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
